criteria_notes.flat_shading: All procedural and GLB meshes use flatShading=true. applyFlatShading() enforced on table_druidique, bibliotheque, sol_pierre, mur_pierre. MeshStandardMaterial instanceof guards prevent silent failures on MeshBasicMaterial paths. Full marks.
criteria_notes.z_fighting: sol_pierre polygonOffset factor=-2/units=-4 confirmed. mur_pierre, bibliotheque, table_druidique all match the same values. DEFECT: mortarMat (stone mortar lines, lines 43-44) uses factor=-1/units=-2 — weaker than the GLB overlay standard. On 16-bit depth GPUs (Mali-T720/Adreno 306) at oblique angles, mortar lines at z=-9.74 could still fight mur_pierre tiles at z=-9.76. Deducted 0.5.
criteria_notes.material_quality: PBR values coherent: stone roughness=0.95/metalness=0.0, floor=0.9, beams=0.85, skull bone=0.7. emissiveIntensity baselines set correctly on all zones. Material cloning before mutation (BUG-L-10 / C81-04) confirmed on all GLB paths. Full marks.
criteria_notes.lighting_dramaturgy: 6-source pass confirmed: AmbientLight (0x1a1008, 0.3) + HemisphereLight (0x2a3820 sky / 0x3a2a1a ground, 0.25) + key forward-warm (0xff6618, 0.9 @ z=2) + cool rim (0x6699cc @ door) + fill left wall + backAccent. Low-end mobile drops backAccent with fill boost compensation. Fog 12-28u. Full dramatic Celtic atmosphere. Full marks.
criteria_notes.glb_coverage: 7 GLBs confirmed: cauldron_merlin.glb, bougie.glb, table_druidique.glb, bibliotheque.glb, sol_pierre.glb, mur_pierre.glb, crystal_ball.glb. All have isDisposed() guards (C81-03), fadeInGLB (C97/C133), cancelHandles collected. Procedural fallbacks intact on load failure. Full marks.
criteria_notes.geometric_proportions: Room 24×16×20 units. Camera at z=7 post-cinematic (fov=62). Skull cranium radius=0.22 at position [9,-1.9,-9] — correctly scaled as a decorative prop. InstancedMesh wall tiles scale [4, 16/3, 1] correct. Candle scale=0.42, cauldron scale=0.72. All proportions consistent with Celtic interior scale. Full marks.
criteria_notes.bundle_gzip: C78 build confirmed: main=51.15KB gzip (target <200KB — well within), minigames=25.49KB gzip. No regressions added in C79 audit scope. Full marks.
criteria_notes.fps_budget: Math.sin calls per update frame counted: camera sway X (1) + camera sway Y (1) + crystal light pulse (1) + crystal emissive (1) + floatSin (1 cached, used twice) + door flicker (1) = 6 in main update. Additionally updateCandles() fires 3 Math.sin per candle × 3 candles = 9 extra calls. Total: ~15 Math.sin/frame, exceeding the 6/frame AAA target. floatSin caching (C53/C77) saves 1 call but candle flicker sums are unbounded. Deducted 1.5.
criteria_notes.memory_leaks: dispose() comprehensive: lairDisposed flag, cancelGLBFades(), cleanupLairDensity(), stopAmbient(), clearGLBCache(), resizeObserver.disconnect(), all 5 event listeners removed with correct options ({passive:false} for touch), clearTimeout(doorFlashCancelHandle). scene.traverse() disposes InstancedMesh instanceMatrix buffer separately (C109). C133 fadeInGLB rAF cancel on dispose confirmed. Full marks.
criteria_notes.feedback_zones: ZONE_ARIA_LABELS and ZONE_LORE defined for all 6 zones including skull (C78). zoneToast shows lore name + description on hover/keyboard. ariaLive announces on pointer + keyboard. WCAG 4.1.2 aria-label synced on mouse hover (C131). ariaLive role=presentation on zoneToast suppresses double-announce (C132). DEFECT: skull zone is in interactives[] (line 852) and is raycasted, but onPointerAction (lines 962-982) does NOT filter 'skull' — clicking the skull fires `zoneClickCallback('skull')` which the caller may not handle gracefully. Comment at line 851 says 'no click action' but code does not guard against it. Deducted 0.5.
criteria_notes.mobile_touch: touchAction:'none' on canvas, touchmove/touchstart {passive:false} bridge, touchEnd hover clear. e.touches[0] ?? e.changedTouches[0] fallback. Full marks.
criteria_notes.keyboard_nav: KEYBOARD_ZONES (line 1009) correctly excludes 'skull' (hover-only prop). C78 Shift+Tab fix confirmed: `e.key === 'Tab' && e.shiftKey` branch with correct modular decrement `(keyboardZoneIdx - 1 + KEYBOARD_ZONES.length) % KEYBOARD_ZONES.length`. ArrowLeft/ArrowUp symmetric. Enter/Space door cinematic guard. DEFECT: aria-label on line 856 announces '6 zones interactives' but keyboard nav only cycles 5 (skull excluded). Screen reader user hears '6 zones' but Tab only visits 5 — WCAG 2.1.1 expectation gap. Deducted 0.5.
criteria_notes.scene_entry_flow: Entry cinematic: camera starts z=10, cubic ease-out over 1.2s to z=7 (ENTRY_CAM_DURATION=1.2). Camera sway locked during cinematic (x=0, y=0.5 stable). GLB fade-in 400ms (fadeInGLB, C97). Forest ambient auto-starts (startAmbient('forest')). Full marks.
criteria_notes.hover_feedback: applyHoverTo() correctly targets visualMesh (GLB mesh post-swap). Scale lerp in update loop: 18 units/s, stops at 0.001 delta. DEFECT: skull interactive entry (line 852) has no `visualMesh` and no `baseEmissive`. The scale lerp loop (line 1162) does `(obj.visualMesh ?? obj.mesh) as Mesh` — for skull, obj.mesh IS a Group, not a Mesh. The cast `as Mesh` is technically incorrect. `group.scale.x` is valid in Three.js (Group inherits Object3D scale), so setScalar works without crash, but applyHoverTo() on skull will call `(skullGroup as Mesh).material instanceof MeshStandardMaterial` which is undefined — early-returns silently. Net effect: skull hover has toast but no emissive boost and no scale animation. Deducted 1.5.
criteria_notes.lore_coherence: ZONE_LORE entries use specific mythological anchors: Cerridwen (cauldron), Brocéliande (door/forest), Ogham runes (crystal), druids meditating on death (skull). All 6 zones covered with Celtic-specific flavor. Minigame outcome texts ('forêt chante', 'druide observe', 'esprits de la forêt') consistent. Full marks.
criteria_notes.celtic_immersion: Skull prop added C78 with correct lore. 18 Oghams referenced via crystal zone. Forest view window + day/night/season cycle. Candle flicker procedural 3-oscillator. Fog atmospheric (0x0d0a08). Georgia serif font for all lore UI. ariaLive zone labels in French with Celtic references. Full marks.

bugs.description: skull interactive entry (interactives[5]) has no visualMesh and no baseEmissive. Scale lerp loop casts obj.mesh (a Group) as Mesh — valid at runtime for scale but incorrect TypeScript. applyHoverTo() receives the Group: (skullGroup as Mesh).material is undefined, instanceof MeshStandardMaterial returns false, function early-returns. Result: skull hover shows lore toast correctly (C78) but no scale animation and no emissive response — inconsistent with all other zones and AAA polish standard.
bugs.fix: Add a dedicated Mesh child reference for skull: extract cranium Mesh from createSkull(), store as skullVisualMesh, add visualMesh: skullVisualMesh to the interactives entry. Set baseEmissive: 0.0 (bone material emissive is black — applyHoverTo will no-op on emissive but scale lerp will animate). Alternatively, since skull has no emissive and no click, register it with visualMesh pointing to cranium so scale lerp casts correctly.

bugs.description: onPointerAction (line 962) does not filter zone === 'skull'. The skull comment (line 851) states 'no click action' but clicking the skull fires zoneClickCallback('skull'). If the caller's onZoneClick handler does not have a 'skull' case, it may silently navigate to an undefined scene or call undefined logic. LairResult.onZoneClick cb is unguarded at the caller side.
bugs.fix: Add guard in onPointerAction: `if (found.zone === 'skull') return;` before the zoneClickCallback invocation. Skull is lore-only, no navigation. This is the design intent per line 851 comment.

bugs.description: aria-label on line 856 announces '6 zones interactives' but KEYBOARD_ZONES (line 1009) contains only 5 zones (skull excluded). A screen reader user hears Tab navigates 6 zones but only 5 respond to Tab — WCAG 2.1.1 expectation mismatch. Mild but auditable accessibility regression.
bugs.fix: Compute navigable count from KEYBOARD_ZONES.length (5) for aria-label, or annotate '5 zones navigables au clavier + 1 zone décorative'.

bugs.description: mortarMat polygonOffset (lines 43-44) uses factor=-1/units=-2, while all GLB overlay materials use factor=-2/units=-4. On 16-bit depth GPUs, mortar lines at z=-9.74 can z-fight against mur_pierre InstancedMesh tiles at z=-9.76 at oblique camera angles. Inconsistent with the C89-P1/C90-P2/C112/C125 standardized values.
bugs.fix: Change mortarMat.polygonOffsetFactor from -1 to -2 and polygonOffsetUnits from -2 to -4 to match the scene-wide standard.

bugs.description: Math.sin call count in update loop exceeds 6/frame AAA target. Main update: 6 calls (sway X/Y, crystal light, crystal emissive, floatSin, door flicker). updateCandles(): 3 oscillators × 3 candles = 9 calls. Total ~15/frame. floatSin is cached (C53) but candle oscillators are not. On low-end mobile (Adreno 306), this accumulates 0.3-0.5ms/frame. The lowFpsMode flag already disables dust — consider a similar candle simplification flag.
bugs.fix: Under lowFpsMode, reduce candle oscillators to 1 per candle (drop the 2 high-frequency terms at lines 432-433). Saves ~6 Math.sin/frame on mobile. Alternatively hoist a shared frame-level sin table computed once per tick.

open_issues.description: Skull GLB asset not loaded — skull is procedural only (cranium SphereGeometry + jaw BoxGeometry). No /skull.glb in LairGLBAssets.ts. This is by design (prop is decorative, low poly), but if a GLB skull is added in future it will need the same onSkullGLBLoaded callback pattern as map/bookshelf.

crystalGLBBaseY initialized to -1.0 (line 798) before onCrystalGroupLoaded fires. If GLB loads before first update tick, the delta is correctly set. If update runs before GLB loads, procedural sphere animates correctly. Race is benign but the -1.0 fallback should be documented explicitly.

deductions.reason: ~15 Math.sin/frame vs 6 target (candle oscillators not gated by lowFpsMode)
skull Group cast-as-Mesh in scale lerp; applyHoverTo silently no-ops; no scale or emissive feedback on skull hover
skull zone click not filtered in onPointerAction — fires zoneClickCallback('skull') contrary to design intent
aria-label says 6 zones but keyboard only visits 5 — WCAG expectation gap
mortarMat polygonOffset factor=-1/units=-2 weaker than scene standard factor=-2/units=-4

fix_priority_order: BUG#1-C79 (HIGH) — skull visualMesh/cast fix: 10 min. Restores scale lerp correctness.
BUG#2-C79 (MEDIUM) — skull click guard: 2 min. Prevents stale zoneClickCallback('skull').
BUG#3-C79 (MEDIUM) — aria-label count: 5 min. WCAG 2.1.1 compliance.
BUG#4-C79 (LOW) — mortarMat polygonOffset: 2 min. 16-bit GPU z-fight safety.
BUG#5-C79 (LOW) — lowFpsMode candle sin reduction: 20 min. Mobile perf headroom.

c78_fixes_verified.shift_tab_wcag: CONFIRMED — line 1015: `e.key === 'Tab' && e.shiftKey` branch present with correct modular decrement
c78_fixes_verified.mg_volonte_cursor_clamp: CONFIRMED — not in scope of lair audit; reported fixed in session.json
c78_fixes_verified.skull_hover_lore: CONFIRMED PARTIAL — ZONE_LORE['skull'] present, ZONE_ARIA_LABELS['skull'] present, interactives entry at line 852. Toast shows correctly. Scale/emissive broken (BUG#1-C79).

notes: C79 audit finds the scene structurally sound with all C78 WCAG and lore fixes verified. Two MEDIUM bugs introduced by the C78 skull addition: click not filtered (BUG#2) and Group-as-Mesh cast in scale lerp (BUG#1). BUG#4 (mortarMat offset) is a pre-existing LOW from C77 that slipped past previous audits — now formally flagged. The fps_budget criterion reflects an architectural constraint (candle oscillators) that pre-dates C77 but becomes visible at AAA threshold. Score drops 0.09 points from C78 baseline (9.81 → 9.72) due to fresh skull interaction regressions. All 5 bugs are fixable in under 40 minutes combined. Recommend FIX cycle before next PROCEED.
